title: Arguments of trig functions must be dimensionless
text: Check $$[at**2/s]$$: $$\frac{{LT}^{\left(-2\right)} T^2}{L}=\frac{L}{L}=dimensionless$$. So the sin argument is fine. But what are the dimensions of sin(...)?

title: sin always returns dimensionless
text: sin of any argument is dimensionless. But $$[v]={LT}^{\left(-1\right)}$$, not dimensionless. So the left and right sides have different dimensions - not consistent.
